message:
refactor(ctypes): Implement CPython-compatible submodules

Implement all ctypes stub files with full CPython API compatibility:

- util.zig: find_library(), find_msvcrt() with platform-specific
  search paths (Windows, macOS, Linux, AIX, Android)
- wintypes.zig: Windows type definitions (DWORD, HANDLE, RECT, MSG,
  WIN32_FIND_DATA, pointer types, RGB helper)
- _endian.zig: BigEndianStructure, LittleEndianStructure,
  BigEndianUnion, LittleEndianUnion, byte swap functions
- _aix.zig: AIX-specific find_library with archive member support
  (libFOO.a(shr.o) format)
- _layout.zig: Structure layout calculation, field alignment,
  pack mode support, bit field handling
- macholib.zig: Re-exports from dyld, dylib, framework submodules
- macholib/dyld.zig: dyld_find(), framework_find() with full
  DYLD_* environment variable support and shared cache detection
- macholib/dylib.zig: dylib_info() for parsing dylib paths
- macholib/framework.zig: framework_info() for parsing framework paths

All implementations include unit tests.
